text:
NEW: Watchboard now visualizes Artemis II's journey to the Moon in 3D.

Real-time spacecraft tracking, mission telemetry HUD (altitude, velocity, distance to Moon), and a 632-waypoint trajectory from launch to splashdown.
Trump warns US will strike Iran "extremely hard over the next two to three weeks" — the most explicit military timeline yet as Day 35 of the war enters a new escalation phase.

Russia: zero net territorial gains in March 2026 — first time in 2.5 years.

Day 1,499: 213 engagements. ~1.3M Russian losses. Ukraine recaptured ~9 sq km.

British intel: most favorable month for Kyiv in 10 months.

BREAKING: US military aircraft reportedly shot down over or near Iran — developing story.

Day 36 of the US-Israel war on Iran. Situation escalating after Trump warned of strikes "extremely hard" within weeks.

RSF drones struck Al-Jabalain Hospital in White Nile State — hitting the operating theater directly.

10 killed, including 7 medical staff.

Day 1,084 of Sudan's civil war. The world isn't watching.

Pentagon casualty cover-up alleged: ~750 US troops killed or wounded in 34 days.

For context, the entire Iraq War killed ~4,500 US troops over 8 years.

1,084 days of civil war.

RSF drones hit a hospital operating theater.

7 medical staff killed.

Zero UN Security Council resolutions.

BREAKING: Russia launches mass missile & drone strikes on Day 1,500 of war, killing 14+ civilians in what Zelensky calls an 'Easter escalation.' Second wave kills at least 5 more. #Ukraine #Watchboard https://watchboard.dev/ukraine-war/?utm_source=x&utm_medium=breaking_hourly&utm_campaign=2026-04-04

BREAKING: Search underway for missing US jet crew member downed in Iran war theater, per @dwnews — Day 36, 2 days before Hormuz deadline.

https://watchboard.dev/iran-conflict/?utm_source=x&utm_medium=breaking_hourly&utm_campaign=2026-04-04
